templates.description: Single-track short-form cut with a clean clip skeleton and no subtitle requirement.

supportingSignals.reason: Use transcript segments when spoken hooks should drive the first short-form cut.
Use beat markers when the edit should lean on music pacing instead of spoken structure.
Use silence markers to trim dead air before turning a rough short into a publishable pass.

templates.description: Short-form cut with subtitle slot prepared for caption-driven publishing.

artifactSlots.description: Optional subtitle file to attach or burn in later.

supportingSignals.reason: Use transcript segments to line up caption-first hooks with spoken lines.
Use beat markers when the short needs rhythm-first pacing but should still keep caption outputs ready.
Use silence markers to catch long pauses before locking subtitle timing and clip boundaries.

templates.description: Talking-head or commentary cut with a prepared BGM slot for later mixing.

artifactSlots.description: Optional background music file mixed under the main audio.

supportingSignals.reason: Use transcript segments to keep commentary cuts aligned with spoken beats instead of ambient pauses.
Use silence markers to remove dead air before adding background music under the voice track.

templates.description: Commentary or talking-head cut with captions ready for social publishing and optional BGM support.

artifactSlots.description: Optional subtitle file for caption-first commentary delivery.
Optional background music file mixed under the commentary track.

supportingSignals.reason: Use transcript segments when commentary structure and caption timing should stay in sync.
Use silence markers to collapse awkward pauses before captions and BGM are finalized.

templates.description: Transcript-friendly explainer cut with subtitle output prepared for tutorial or walkthrough delivery.

artifactSlots.description: Optional subtitle file for tutorial captions or localized sidecar delivery.

supportingSignals.reason: Use transcript segments to preserve explainer structure and keep scene transitions tied to spoken ideas.
Use silence markers to spot natural chapter breaks or pauses before tutorial captions are rendered.

templates.description: Rhythm-first montage template tuned for beat-group seeding and optional music replacement.

artifactSlots.description: Optional music bed used to drive montage energy or replace source backing audio.

supportingSignals.reason: Use beat markers as the primary cut scaffold for rhythm-first montage timing.
Use separated stems when the source music bed needs cleanup or replacement before montage mixing.

templates.description: Beat-driven montage template with optional lyric or hook captions and a prepared music bed slot.

artifactSlots.description: Optional subtitle or lyric file for overlay-ready montage captions.
Optional music bed used as the driving track for the montage.

supportingSignals.reason: Use beat markers to keep montage pacing locked to the driving track.
Use separated stems when lyric captions or hook overlays need a cleaner accompaniment bed.

templates.description: First schema v2 timeline starter with real clip effects, optional transcript/beat seeding, and an optional BGM track.

artifactSlots.description: Optional background music file placed on a dedicated v2 timeline audio track.

supportingSignals.reason: Use transcript segments when the first v2 timeline pass should follow spoken beats instead of the default demo skeleton.
Use beat markers when the first v2 timeline pass should inherit rhythm-first pacing from music or motion.
